scripts.start: bun run prepare:browser && bun run prepare:media && bun run prepare:piper && bun run src/index.ts
scripts.dev: bun run prepare:browser && bun run prepare:media && bun run prepare:piper && bun --watch run src/index.ts
scripts.build: bun run prepare:browser && bun run prepare:media && bun run prepare:piper && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --bytecode --compile-exec-argv=--no-warnings --asset-naming="[name].[ext]" --outfile ./dist/luna-ai && bun run package:runtime
